news.headline: ImmuCell begins Investigational Product use of Re-Tain®, improving animal health and productivity. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, on April 2, 2025, ImmuCell Corporation (Nasdaq: ICCC), a leading animal health company specializing in enhancing the health and productivity of dairy and beef cattle, has unveiled the commencement of Investigational Product use for Re-Tain®. Promising scientifically-backed products are at the core of ImmuCell's operations, aimed at advancing the well-being and efficiency of livestock.

news.headline: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals reported financial results, focusing on plogosertib, with pro forma cash at $7.2M, expenses down, and new board appointments.
news.summary: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has reported its fourth-quarter financial results and business update. The company is focusing on developing plogosertib, a PLK 1 inhibitor for advanced cancers and hematological malignancies. They acquired it from their subsidiary and anticipate decreased research expenses resulting from the subsidiary's liquidation, intending to increase stockholder equity by $5.0 million. As of Dec 31, 2024, their pro forma cash was $7.2 million, with total expenses lowered, and available cash expected to last into Q2 of 2025. The net loss for Dec 31, 2024, was $3.0 million compared to $5.3 million in 2023. New appointments to the board include Ms. Inigo Angel Laurduraj and Dr. Satis Waran Nair Krishnan as independent directors. The company is developing innovative cancer medicines and optimizing its strategy. For detailed financial statements, visit their website.

news.headline: Luxshare-Tech & Semtech introduce 1.6T Active Copper Cable at OFC 2025, with 224G/lane linear equalizer/redriver ICs.
news.summary: In San Francisco at OFC 2025, Luxshare-Tech, a top provider of high-performance interconnect solutions, partnered with Semtech, a leading supplier of high-performance semiconductors, IoT systems, and cloud connectivity services, to introduce the 1.6T OSFP Active Copper Cable (ACC). This cutting-edge product is supported by Semtech's innovative CopperEdge™ technology. The Luxshare-Tech 1.6T OSFP ACC, now available, integrates Semtech's 224G/lane linear equalizer/redriver ICs to deliver top-notch performance.

news.headline: ClearSign Technologies Corporation achieves record revenues of $3.6 million in 2024 with 50.3M shares outstanding. Strategic collaborations and growth plans outlined.
news.summary: ClearSign Technologies Corporation reported record annual revenue of $3.6 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to $2.4 million in 2023, largely attributed to a significant order for 20 process burners from a California refinery. The company also launched a co-branded burner product line with Zeeco and received orders for projects in Texas, a Gulf Coast facility, and from power generation companies in Oklahoma and Missouri. As of December 31, 2024, the company had approximately $14 million in cash and 50,285,509 shares issued. The company focuses on developing technologies for decarbonization and industrial system improvements. They will host a conference call for investors and have outlined cautionary statements regarding forward-looking projections.

news.headline: Expedia (NASDAQ: EXPE) to webcast Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025; release post market close and webcast at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET.
news.summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The report will be released on Thursday, May 8, 2025, through an earnings release and webcast. Investors can access these documents on the company's official website at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will be published after the close of the market, with the webcast scheduled to start at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time. A replay of the call will also be available for those who miss the live event.

news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics will present 5 posters at 2025 AACR Annual Meeting. Company focused on small molecule therapeutics.
news.summary: Enliven Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in Boulder, Colorado, disclosed that they will be showcasing five posters at an upcoming event. The company, listed as ELVN on Nasdaq, specializes in small molecule therapeutics. This news was released on April 2, 2025, and signifies a significant step for Enliven as they continue their work in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: Daiso opens new store in North Richland Hills, Texas on April 5th featuring exclusive Threeppy line.
news.summary: On April 5th, 2025, Daiso, a well-known retail chain offering affordable and distinctive products, will open its newest store in North Richland Hills, Texas. Situated at The Crossing, this location marks the latest addition to Daiso's global network.

news.headline: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals to present at 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025, at 9:30 am ET.
news.summary: A pharmaceutical company based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: BCRX), revealed its participation in the upcoming 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The company is scheduled to present on Wednesday, April 9, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: ISS National Lab launches Orbital Edge Accelerator program, 3 companies to invest in 6 startups, aiming to boost space economy.
news.summary: Three prominent companies, CIRI, E2MC, and Stellar Ventures, have announced their collective investment in six startups focused on developing projects that will utilize the resources of the International Space Station (ISS) National Laboratory. This significant venture is set to take place at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The startups selected for funding will have the opportunity to leverage the ISS National Lab's state-of-the-art facilities and cutting-edge technology. This initiative marks a crucial step in fostering innovation within the space industry and nurturing the next generation of space entrepreneurs.

news.headline: RavenQuest on Immutable becomes most streamed Web3 game with over 1 million unique viewers, surpasses Final Fantasy XIV.
news.summary: Tavernlight Games is excited to announce that RavenQuest has become the most streamed Web3 game on Twitch and has quickly risen to become the fourth ranked MMORPG, surpassing Final Fantasy XIV just one hour after its global launch on Immutable. This news comes from Sydney on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Alkermes to present at 24th Annual Healthcare Conference on Orexin Receptor Agonist for sleep-wake disorders.
news.summary: Dublin-based company Alkermes plc, listed on Nasdaq as ALKS, revealed its participation in a webcast panel discussion on the "Development of Orexin Receptor Agonist in Sleep-Wake Disorders" at the 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Fate Therapeutics granted 32,200 RSUs to two new non-executive employees, with vesting over 4 years.
news.summary: Fate Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FATE, based in San Diego, announced on April 1, 2025, the granting of restricted stock units (RSUs) to two new non-executive employees. These RSUs amount to 32,200 shares of common stock and were approved by the Compensation Committee. They were issued under the Amended and Restated Inducement Equity Plan as part of the new employees' recruitment. The RSUs will vest over a four-year period, with 25% of the shares vesting annually on each anniversary of the grant date, contingent on the employees' continuous employment with the company.

news.headline: Former Pfizer R&D Chief Mikael Dolsten joins Formation Bio to lead drug picking committee. Announcement made on April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Formation Bio, a cutting-edge pharmaceutical company utilizing artificial intelligence to transform drug development, disclosed on April 2, 2025, that Mikael Dolsten, MD, PhD, ex Chief Scientific Officer and President of Pfizer Research & Development, has recently been appointed to the company as a strategic advisor.

news.headline: B. Riley Securities to host 14th Annual charity boxing night on May 21, 2025 in Marina Del Ray, California.
news.summary: On May 21, 2025, at the luxurious Ritz-Carlton Marina Del Ray in Los Angeles, B. Riley Securities (BRS), a prominent middle market investment bank, will host the 14th Annual "Big Fighters, Big Cause" Charity event. This event marks a significant occasion for the company, showcasing its commitment to giving back to the community. The event is scheduled to take place on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: PATH Water partners with Exceptional Minds, a nonprofit aiding autistic young adults in the digital arts.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, on April 2, 2025, PATH disclosed an innovative collaboration with Exceptional Minds, a non-profit arts academy, to equip young adults with autism spectrum disorder for digital arts careers. This partnership signifies a significant step in merging the talents of individuals on the spectrum with the rapidly growing digital arts industry.

news.headline: First Hawaiian (NASDAQ:FHB) to report Q1 2025 financial results on April 23, with conference call at 1pm EST.
news.summary: First Hawaiian, Inc. (NASDAQ:FHB) has announced that it is set to reveal its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 23, 2025 before the market opens. The conference call to discuss these results will be held on the same day at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time (7:00 a.m. Hawaii Time). Participants can join the call by registering via the provided link: https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BI13d3259b1b3b46188926f83e1bbe1316. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bassett Furniture's Q1 FY25 results: $82.2M sales, $2.5M operating income, 5.1% revenue decrease, 2.2% increase after normalization.
news.summary: Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. reported its first-quarter results for fiscal year 2025, with revenues decreasing by 5.1% due to one less week compared to the previous year. However, after adjusting for the extra week in the prior year, sales revenue increased by 2.2%. The company achieved operating income of $2.5 million, a significant improvement from a loss of $(2.4) million in the prior year quarter. Gross margin increased by 170 basis points to 57.0%, and selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased by 400 basis points to 54.0% of sales. Diluted earnings per share were $0.21 compared to a loss of $(0.14). Consolidated sales for the quarter were $82.2 million, down 5.1% from the previous year, while operating income improved to 3.0% of sales. Wholesale sales decreased by 3.3%, retail sales had a minor decrease of 0.9%, and corporate and other operations saw a loss. The CEO mentioned plans for 2025 include cost reduction, product innovation, and growth initiatives. Bassett will hold a conference call on April 3, 2025, to discuss these results further. More information is available on the company's investor relations website.

news.headline: Riverview Bancorp declares $0.02 per share quarterly cash dividend on April 25 to shareholders of record on April 14.
news.summary: Vancouver, WA - Riverview Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq GSM: RVSB) shared that on March 27, 2025, its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, consistent with the previous quarter. The dividend will be distributed on April 25, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of April 14, 2025.

news.headline: NASA astronaut Jonny Kim will launch with two cosmonauts aboard the Roscosmos Soyuz MS-27 spacecraft to the ISS to join Expedition 72/73.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, NASA astronaut Jonny Kim is set to embark on a space mission aboard the Roscosmos Soyuz MS-27 spacecraft bound for the International Space Station. Kim will be joined by cosmonauts Sergey Ryzhikov and Alexey Zubritsky. This mission will see them joining the Expedition 72/73 crew to further progress in space exploration.

news.headline: Mayor Adams of NYC has corruption case dismissed by judge, making it permanent.
Oil prices fluctuate with attention shifting to potential US tariffs on "Liberation Day", causing uncertainty.
Financial experts recommend lowering valuations for IPOs due to market challenges.
Salesian Missions initiates appeal for Myanmar-Thailand earthquake victims; 7.7 magnitude quake impacts Mandalay community.
news.summary: After a powerful 7.7 magnitude earthquake struck Mandalay, the Salesian community is in urgent need of assistance. Salesian Missions, the U.S. development arm of Salesians of Don Bosco, has initiated an emergency fundraising campaign. The quake has severely impacted the Salesian community, prompting the urgent call for donations to support relief efforts. This appeal aims to provide vital aid to those affected by the disaster. The earthquake's aftermath has left a trail of destruction, underscoring the pressing need for assistance in the region. To address this crisis, Salesian Missions is urging individuals to contribute to the relief fund and help the Salesian community in Mandalay recover from this catastrophic event.

news.headline: Brazil's 'Dubai' plans tallest tower, aiming for a record-breaking residential height.
Former US Treasury Secretary criticizes President Trump for threatening to withhold funding from Harvard University, deeming it authoritarian.
Who benefits from Trump's tariffs?
Ecopetrol searches for gas in the Caribbean, aiming to boost reserves.
TalkShopLive partners with Billboard to launch Billboard Book Club, starting with author Geri Halliwell-Horner. Allows consumers to preorder books by favorite artists.
news.summary: The Exclusive Book Club, led by renowned author Geri Halliwell-Horner, is being launched in Hollywood. Consumers can now pre-order books by their beloved artists through this club. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025. This initiative is supported by TalkShopLive®, a prominent livestream social commerce platform.

news.headline: Nioko Resources files an early warning report for Orezone Gold Corp. in Canada, with a head office in Vancouver.
news.summary: Nioko Resources Corporation ("Nioko Resources" or the "Acquiror") has issued a news release in Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso on April 02, 2025, following the early warning requirements of Canada’s National Instrument 62-104 and National Instrument 62-103 regarding common shares (the “Common Shares”) of Orezone Gold Corporation ("Orezone"). Orezone is a reporting issuer in all Canadian Provinces and Territories and has its head office at 450-505 Burrard St., Vancouver, British Columbia, V7X 1M3.

news.headline: Palo Alto Networks' Composite Rating rises to 96 from 94, securing its position among top cybersecurity stocks.
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks experienced a significant increase in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, rising from 94 to 96 on Wednesday. This boost solidified its position among the top cybersecurity stocks, reflecting positive market performance.

news.headline: Nvidia's Blackwell platform breaks AI records, stock fluctuates. Key benchmark results but market reaction mixed.
news.summary: Nvidia's Blackwell computing platform has achieved exceptional results in artificial intelligence inferencing tests, setting new performance records. Despite this, the news caused fluctuations in Nvidia's stock value. The benchmark tests demonstrated the platform's high capabilities in AI, showcasing impressive results that have garnered attention in the investment community. This development highlights Nvidia's continued advancement in the field of AI technology, attracting interest from investors and analysts.

news.headline: AARP Pennsylvania cautions residents 50+ about IRS scams as tax season approaches, aiming to protect from money and data theft.
news.summary: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on April 2, 2025, AARP is warning individuals over 50 about an increase in scams where criminals impersonate IRS agents. This scam targets older residents, aiming to extract money and personal details by preying on their fears and uncertainties during tax season. Residents are advised to remain vigilant and protect their information to avoid falling victim to this fraudulent activity.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group provides data leaders with strategic roadmap to align data initiatives with business goals, gain C-suite support.
news.summary: A recent resource update by Info-Tech Research Group, a leading global IT research and advisory firm, offers data leaders a strategic guide to align data initiatives with core business goals and secure vital support from the C-suite. The updated resource presents actionable steps...

news.headline: Nokia completes share buyback program buying 150M shares at avg EUR 4.69/share, reducing equity by approx EUR 703M.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation has successfully concluded its share buyback program that began in November 2024 in order to counterbalance the impact of the Infinera acquisition. Over the period between 25th November 2024 and 2nd April 2025, Nokia repurchased 150,000,000 of its own shares (FI0009000681) at an average price of about EUR 4.69 per share. The acquired shares, totaling 220,509,131, are anticipated to be canceled in April 2025. These transactions resulted in a reduction of approximately EUR 703 million in the Company’s unrestricted equity. The share repurchases were carried out through directed repurchases, not proportionate to existing shareholdings, on the Nasdaq Helsinki market and selected multilateral trading facilities. Nokia is a technology company dedicated to fostering global collaboration.

news.headline: Musk in regard to DOGE resigning scoop: Fake news.
7 members of Congress have bought and sold Tesla stock since 2024 election, ranging from $1,000 to $15,000.
news.summary: In 2024, Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) stock saw a significant increase after Donald Trump's win in the presidential election, boosting CEO Elon Musk's wealth. Members of Congress were also involved in trading Tesla stock, drawing attention to potential insider trading concerns due to their positions. It is speculated that some Congress members bought Tesla stocks post-election, anticipating Musk's involvement in the new administration and seeking to benefit from the company's growth. Notable transactions include Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene buying $1,000 to $15,000 worth of stock, Rep. Rob Bresnahan selling the same amount, Rep. Gilbert Cisneros buying, and Rep. Josh Gottheimer selling Tesla stock within the $1,000 to $15,000 range. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Toll Brothers at Ascension features 3 collections of luxury homes in Summerlin, offering build-to-order and quick move-in options.
news.summary: New luxury single-family home designs are being introduced in the popular Summerlin master plan community. These designs include three new collections, with a selection of quick move-in homes available. Interested buyers have the opportunity to choose from a variety of high-end homes tailored to their tastes and needs. This development is sure to attract attention with its sought-after location and luxurious offerings.

news.headline: Senate reveals strategy to expedite tax cuts and increase debt ceiling reports.
ASI Show Fort Worth trade show dazzles with thousands of attendees exploring latest promo products and industry trends.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on April 2, 2025, the Advertising Specialty Institute® (ASI) concluded a successful ASI Show® Fort Worth trade show with thousands of distributors and suppliers in attendance. The event showcased the newest promotional products and addressed key industry issues.

news.headline: DoubleZero Protocol seeks validator funding with a token sale for native token. Accredited investors can apply through CoinList from April 2-10. Validators of Solana, Celestia, Sui, Aptos, and Avalanche networks are eligible. $28M raised earlier; mainnet launch in 2025.
news.summary: The DoubleZero Protocol, a blockchain network, is offering a validator funding round for accredited investors on the CoinList platform from April 2-10. The round is open to validators serving networks like Solana, Celestia, Sui, Aptos, and Avalanche. Interested parties can submit bids for token prices and budgets to determine final sale prices. The protocol aims to launch its mainnet in the second half of 2025 after raising $28 million in March. It focuses on using a dedicated fiber optic network to enhance speed and communication in blockchain networks. The market is showing growth potential as seen through recent capital fundraising activities in the crypto industry. Federa, a co-founder, highlighted the sale's significance for validators securing high-performance blockchains. Venture capital firms Multicoin Capital and Dragonfly Capital led the fundraising round.

news.headline: Millennials focus on stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and student loans. Insights on retirement planning. via Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Explore the unconventional investment strategies and retirement plans of millennials, revealing surprising trends. Discover how this generation is embracing stocks, ETFs, and personal finance to secure their financial future amidst challenges like student loans. Unlock insights into the unique approach taken by millennials toward investments and retirement planning in today's dynamic financial landscape.

news.headline: Investor Peter Schiff warns of economic crisis due to tariffs, rates, Fed policies. Higher inflation, weaker consumer expected.
news.summary: Investors in stocks and ETFs should pay attention to Peter Schiff's warning of impending trouble. The renowned investor believes the government and financial media are repeating the same mistakes that led to the 2008 Global Financial Crisis. Schiff points to tariffs, rising interest rates, and Federal Reserve policies as the new culprits that could spark an economic crisis. He argues that tariffs will not only disrupt trade but will also lead to inflation due to fewer goods entering the country, resulting in higher domestic prices. This could have a cascading effect on the economy, weakening consumer spending and squeezing corporate profits. Schiff predicts that lower trade deficits will reduce the inflow of dollars into U.S. bonds, potentially causing long-term consequences. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hover adds Virtual Walkthrough technology to its claims automation platform, enhancing interior solutions with a single smartphone scan.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Hover has enhanced its claims automation platform by introducing a new interior solution that incorporates Virtual Walkthrough technology. This innovation allows users to conduct detailed inspections with a single scan using their smartphones.

news.headline: Get the latest news on Alphabet (GOOGL) stock, including quotes and analysis, from Google's parent company.
news.summary: Stay informed about the most recent updates from Alphabet, the parent company of Google, including quotes and analysis of the tech giant's stock performance. Explore Alphabet's (GOOGL) stock quotes, company news, and chart analysis to make informed investment decisions. Investor's Business Daily provides comprehensive coverage for investors and traders seeking insights into Alphabet's latest developments and stock trends.

news.headline: Karen T. Moran named new President, Commercial Markets at Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan, starting April 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Detroit on April 2, 2025, it was announced that Karen T. Moran is set to become the new executive vice president and President, Commercial Markets at Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan starting from April 7, 2025. This transition follows Ken Dallafior's retirement at the end of 2025.

news.headline: Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers criticized President Trump for threatening to withhold funds from Harvard, calling it "authoritarian."
Wiland, Inc. introduces MarketSignals on Snowflake, offering predictive insights and precise audience targeting in the cloud.
news.summary: A company based in Niwot, Colorado, has announced that Wiland's MarketSignals, a tool for delivering predictive insights and precise audience targeting, can now be accessed as a connected app on Snowflake. This move allows users to leverage the benefits of cloud computing for improved business growth.

news.headline: Federal judge allows Green Oceans' lawsuit against Revolution Wind offshore wind project to proceed in Rhode Island and Massachusetts.
news.summary: A lawsuit aiming to halt the development of large wind turbines in the waters of Rhode Island and Massachusetts has received approval to proceed by U.S. District Judge Royce C. Lamberth. The legal action, supported by the non-partisan organization Green Oceans, was challenged by Revolution Wind - the entity overseeing the project. They contended that the citizen plaintiffs lacked legal standing. The grassroots group confirmed that the case will move forward against the construction, which has been deemed environmentally harmful.

news.headline: Invest in Bitcoin, Ethereum for retirement now available for Fidelity customers, offering new options for retirement funds.
Cuomo advised OKX on US probe response. #CryptoExchange #AndrewCuomo #OKX #Bloomberg
news.summary: In the latest developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the main index falling by 3.5% to 25,000 points. Experts attribute these negative trends to the ongoing economic challenges faced by the nation. On a more positive note, there has been a slight increase in consumer spending, with retail sales growing by 2.1% last month. Overall, the economic outlook remains uncertain, as the country continues to grapple with the impacts of the pandemic.
